steps.title: Identify what we need to find
steps.content: We're given the equation $s = 40 + 2t$ where $s$ is speed in miles per hour and $t$ is time in seconds. We need to find the speed when $t = 3$ seconds.

steps.title: Substitute t equals 3 and solve
steps.content:
Substitute $t = 3$ into the equation:
$$s = 40 + 2(3)$$
$$s = 40 + 6$$
$$s = 46$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
